case_title: SHANNON LYNN ET AL VS. NANCY CHUNG

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-22-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-04-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $18.50 SERVED MAY-04-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, NANCY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYNN, SHANNON FRITZEN, CASSANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, NANCY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $68.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,068.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,538.41 FILED BY LYNN, SHANNON FRITZEN, CASSANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF SHANNON LYNN RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNN, SHANNON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF'S SHANNON LYNN & CASSANDRA FRITZEN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT NANCY CHUNG IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED WITH COURT UNTIMELY. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LYNN, SHANNON FRITZEN, CASSANDRA CHUNG, NANCY
